C

CameraScanReader - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
0- Rear camera (default)
1 – Front camera
CancelTrans() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
To cancel last process by sending command to terminal.
CardBin - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.CardInfo
The card BIN as the leading 6 or 8 digits.

The card holder name, if the card holder name exists, this field is mandatory.

CardType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchRequest
Indicate the Card type.
CardType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.HostGateWay
The card type, refer to the Card Type Definition
Required for Multi Token Pay trans for some hosts.
CardType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
Displays the card type used.
CardType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportRequest
Indicate the Card type.
CardType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Displays the card type used.

Cash transaction total amount
CashAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Cash transaction total amount.
CashBackAmt - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Cash back amount, $$$$$$$CC, if field is NULL, and terminal switch is on, terminal prompts dialog to enter it.
CashBackAmt - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
The cash back amount, $$$$$$$CC, if the field is NULL, and the switch on terminal turn on, terminal will prompt dialog to enter it.

Cash transaction total counts
CashCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.MerchantTotals

Cash transaction total counts.

Once this amount is reached it will not accept any SAF record.
CeilingAmountPerCardType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Once this amount is reached it will not accept any SAF record.

CHECK transaction total amount
CHECKAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Check transaction total amount.
CheckBuffer - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
If check mode = 0, PED won’t check KCV, this data is no meaning.
If check mode = 1, the KCV length should be 4 bytes.

CHECK transaction total counts
CHECKCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.MerchantTotals
CHECK transaction total counts

CheckOutDate - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo
The time and date of check-out.

CheckTotalTaxAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.TotalTax

Employee/clerk id.

Code - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ProcessTransResult

CoFIndicator - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior
Indicates if the transaction is Credential/Card on File (CoF) transaction.
CoFInitiator - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior
Indicates if the credential/card on file (CoF) transaction is customer initiated or merchant initiated.

Is a predefined number specific to the merchant.
CollectID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService

CUPCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
CurrencyCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
5F2A, Transaction currency code.
CurrencyExponent - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
5F36: Transaction Currency Exponent
CurrentInstallment - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.MOTOECommerce
Current installment number.
CustomData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Custom data string to be encrypted, Used to define any special formats for sensitive data (PAN, Track2, etc).
CustomEncryptedData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
An array of encrypted strings representing custom encrypted data.
CustomerCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
The reference identifier (e.g., Customer Code, Purchase Order Number, Cardholder Reference Number etc.) supplied by the commercial card cardholder.
CustomerData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCard
Deprecated.
Generic fleet customer data.
CustomerData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCardRequest
Generic fleet customer data.
CustomerData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCardResponse
Generic fleet customer data.
CustomerTaxID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo
The customer tax ID.
CustomerTaxID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail
When Tax Type is 00 Unknown or 01 - Federal/National Sales Tax , this field is customer’s federal tax ID.
When Tax Type is 07 - Value Added Tax (VAT), this field is customer’s VAT registration number.
CustomerTaxID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.TaxDetail
When Tax Type is 00 Unknown or 01 - Federal/National Sales Tax , this field is customer’s federal tax ID.
When Tax Type is 07 - Value Added Tax (VAT), this field is customer’s VAT registration number.
CustomFormRequest - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
The CustomFormRequest for Customize Form Management.
CustomFormResponse - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
The response for customize form management.
CustomizeData1 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.HostGateWay
The customized data can be used to generate customized billing or reports etc … for the merchant.
CustomizeData2 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.HostGateWay
The customized data can be used to generate customized billing or reports etc … for the merchant.
CustomizeData3 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.HostGateWay
The customized data can be used to generate customized billing or reports etc … for the merchant.
CustomMACInfo - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Data encrypted by MAC Key.

Request the Custom MAC Information.

Cvm - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.EmvTag
Cardholder Verification Method (CVM) Codes,
Cvm - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Cardholder Verification Method (CVM) Codes,
CvResponse - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
CVV response code .
CvResponse - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
CVV response code.
CVVBypassReason - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
The reason the CVV or Gift Card PIN was not provided.
CVVCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
The CVV code, if the switch in terminal turns on, this field can exist or NULL, else it must be NULL.
CVVErrorCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AddlRspData
CVVErrorCode for MasterCard.
CVVPrompt - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Whether CVV need to be prompted during manual entry, Default as 0;
